response.original_title: Vianey Huizar in La Coralillo De La Muerte (2023) La Coralillo De La Muerte
response.overview: Susana "La Coralillo" knows too much about her powerful boss, making her a dangerous liability. To silence her, an order is given for her execution.  But Susana survives. Rising from the attempt on her life, she returns with one purpose — revenge.  As she strikes back, her actions ignite an open war between rival gangs, leaving a trail of violence and chaos. In a world ruled by power and betrayal, Susana is willing to risk everything, even innocent lives, to settle the score.
response.title: Vianey Huizar in La Coralillo De La Muerte (2023) La Coralillo De La Muerte
